issue: Dashboard overview trial/Roblox verification hint collapsed into a narrow grid column; setup/help cards had cramped text and plain corners.
rootCause: overview-trial-hint was the third child inside .account-summary-card grid and did not span both columns, so it rendered in a single narrow column.
fixes: Added grid-column: 1 / -1, full width, wider copy area, and no-wrap button for .overview-trial-hint.
Added angled clipped corners, stronger glass gradient, more padding, and better paragraph line-height for .setup-card.
Bumped public CSS query strings to v=20260621-3a50 so browsers do not keep stale broken CSS.

verification.localDashboardResult: Trial hint renders full width with button separated on the right; no vertical word stacking or overlap seen.
verification.howToGetKeyRoute: src/server.js maps /how-to-get-key to public/how-to-get-key.html; local .html request returned 200.
